prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KINGSEMI-CARRIER-PARENT Product Type: NON_RIDING_TOY_VEHICLE Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Thunder Wheels Diecast Toy Car, 6 Vehicle Auto Hauler Transporter Truck Description: The Kidplokio friction-powered semi toy truck cargo carrier with fun lights and sounds, moves all on its own with just a little help from the kids. Simply push and pull the toy truck back and forth and then watch as you let it zoom across the room. This great value toy set comes with three fun colored ATV's and three off road vehicles, that kids can play with alongside the semi cargo carrier or on their own. The smaller toy vehicles slide out the back of the truck through a flip down door and, when kids are done playing, the smaller play vehicles fit perfectly inside the large semi truck for storage and safety.

The best part about the Kidplokio friction-powered semi toy truck cargo carriers are the fun, interactive and sensory lights and sounds. Kids will have an absolute blast pushing the buttons on the side of the cargo carrier toy truck, boosting little ones' playtime to the next level as they rev the engine, honk the horn or drive to fun music. With easy to use friction power, six removable mini off road vehicles and ATV's, durable quality and fun driving details, the Kidplokio Friction Power King Semi Truck Toy Cargo Carrier with Lights Sounds will make a perfect gift for children or toddlers ages three years and up.

AVAILABLE COLORS: Blue or Red

NOTE: No assembly required, fun starts right out of the box.

WARNING: Choking Hazard (small parts) Search Terms: toy truck trucks semi carriers car cars best selling toy vehicle diecast transporter truck for boys christmas toy stocking stuffer holiday gift from grandma education pretend play space hero boy toy Features: - PUSH N' GO (FRICTION POWERED): The Kidplokio Car Carrier Truck travels on its own - simply give the truck a few pushes and let go to watch it roll forward in a hurry! For optimal performance the wheels work best on a smooth surface. No assembly required - toy truck is ready to use right out the box. - LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Simply press the button located on the top of the vehicle at any time for lights and action sounds. These features are sure to delight the little ones and have them play along. - REALISTIC, SAFE, AND DURABLE: Car carrier truck is crafted with realistic features to enhance the fun and have your child playing for hours. The truck includes three removeable cars and can detach from the trailer. The trailer tailgate can be lowered - GREAT GIFT IDEA AGES 3 AND UP: With easy to use friction power, six removable mini Trucks and ATV's, durable quality and fun driving details, the Kidplokio Friction Power King Semi Truck Toy Cargo Carrier with Lights Sounds will make a perfect gift for children or toddlers ages three years and up - AGES 3+ | Enjoy Hours of Entertainment and Delightful Fun === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio Thunder Wheels 6-Vehicle Diecast Toy Truck

anthropic.title_differentiation: Friction Powered, Lights And Sounds, 6 Removable Vehicles, Semi Cargo Carrier, Ages 3

openai.title_differentiation: Friction Powered Push N' Go, Lights And Sounds, 6 Removable Vehicles, Detachable Trailer, Ages 3 And Up
